SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 – Online Apply for 12256 Posts
details:
Organization
Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
Name of Post
Group B and Group C posts
No of Posts
12256 posts
Qualification
Graduate
Age Limit
18 to 27 years, 20 to 30 years, 18 to 30 years and 18 to 30 years
Application Fee
Rs. 100/-
Start Date
21st May 2026
Last Date
25th June 2026
SSC CGL Recruitment 2026
Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
has released the official notification of
Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Examination 2026
for the recruitment of approximately
12256
Group B and Group C posts
in different Ministries/ Departments/ Organizations of Government of India and various Constitutional Bodies/ Statutory Bodies/ Tribunals, etc.
Interested and eligible candidates may
apply online
here.
SSC CGL Recruitment Details
Name of examination: Combined Graduate Level Examination, 2026
Name of posts:
Various Group B and Group C Posts (Assistant Audit Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer, Assistant Section Officer, Inspector, Sub Inspector, Inspector of Posts, Statistical Investigator, Office Superintendent, Auditor , Accountant, Tax Assistant , Postal Assistant/ Sorting Assistant, etc  )
No of posts:
12,256 posts (approximately)
Pay Scale:
Pay Level 4 to Pay Level 8 (Pay Scale of ₹ 25500 to 81100 till ₹ 47600 to 151100, as per level of posts)
Helpline No:
1800 309 3063 (Toll Free)
Related Article:
SSC CHSL Recruitment
Eligibility Criteria of SSC CGL Recruitment
Age Limit:
There are four categories of age ranges: 18 to 27 years, 20 to 30 years, 18 to 30 years and 18 to 30 years.
Age Relaxation:
Category-wise age relaxation is as mentioned below
# SC/ST: 5 years
# OBC: 3 years
# PwD (Unreserved): 10 years
# PwD (OBC): 13 years
# PwD (SC/ST): 15 years
Educational Qualification:
Junior Statistical Officer
:
Bachelor’s Degree in any subject from a recognized University or Institute with at least 60% Marks in Mathematics at 12th standard level;
Or
Bachelor’s Degree in any subject with Statistics as one of the subjects at degree level.
Statistical Investigator Grade-II
:
Bachelor degree in Statistics or Mathematics or Economics or Demography or Population Studies or Operation Research or Information Technology or Computer Science or Computer Engineering or Computer Technology or Computer Application or Data Science or Artificial Intelligence from a recognized University or recognized Institute.
All Other Posts
:
Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University or Institute.
## The candidates who have appeared in their final year of their graduation can also apply, however they must possess Essential qualification as on 01.08.2026.
Application Fee of SSC CGL Exam
# General/ OBC:
Rs. 100/-
# SC/ ST/ Women/Ex-Servicemen:
Nil
# Payment Mode:
Through Debit/ Credit Card/SBI Challan/SBI Net Banking
Exam Centres in North Eastern Region (NER)
Here is the list of examination centres in North Eastern Region states:
# Itanagar (5001)
# Dibrugarh (5102)
# Guwahati (Dispur) (5105)
# Jorhat (5107)
# Silchar (5111)

# Kohima (5302)
# Shillong (5401)

Interested and eligible candidates may
apply online
for these vacancy by visiting official
SSC Recruitment Portal.
Candidates may follow below mentioned steps to apply online.
# Scroll down, go to
Important Web-Links
section .
# Click on the "
Online Application
Form
" and complete the registration process.
# In the next stage, click on "
Online Application Form
" Link and Login.
# Fill your all
personal and educational details
and
upload
necessary documents.
# At the end,
pay the application fee
as per your category and
submit
the form.
# Don't forget to take a
print
out of the application form .
Important Dates of SSC CGL Recruitment 2026
Starting date of submission of online application:
21st May 2026
Last date of submission of online application:
22nd June 2026
Reopening of online application: 23rd June 2026 (23:00 hours) to 25th June 2026 (23:00 hours)

title: CSIR Recruitment 2026 – 100 Assistant Section Officer (ASO) Posts
details:
Organization
Council of Scientific & Industrial Research (CSIR)
Name of Post
Assistant Section Officer (ASO)
No of Posts
100 posts
Qualification
Graduate
Age Limit
Below 33 years
Application Fee
Rs. 500/-
Start Date
23rd June 2026
Last Date
13th July 2026
CSIR Recruitment 2026
Council of Scientific & Industrial Research
(CSIR)
has released the official notification for the recruitment of
100 Assistant Section Officer (ASO) posts
in different categories. Non-recommended candidates of
Civil Services Examination
-2024 (CSE-2024) conducted by Union Public Service Commission are eligible to apply for these posts.
Interested
and eligible candidates may check this article for detailed official
notification, educational qualification, age limit, salary details, and
application procedure to be followed.
CSIR Recruitment Details
Name of post: Assistant Section Officer
No of posts:
100 posts
Vacancy break-up:
General: 61 posts
Finance & Accounts: 18 posts
Stores & Purchase: 21 posts
Name of organization:
Council of Scientific & Industrial Research (CSIR)
Pay Matrix:
Group B (Non-Gazetted) Pay Level – 7, Cell – 1 (Rs. 44,900 –Rs. 1,42,400)
Eligibility Criteria of CSIR ASO Recruitment
Citizenship:
The applicant must be a citizen of India.
Age Limit:
Candidate age should not exceed 33 years as on the closing date of online application.
Age Relaxation:
Category-wise age relaxation is as mentioned below.
SC: 5 years
ST: 5 years
OBC/ NCL: 3 years
PWBD: 10 years
PWBD + OBC(NCL): 13 years
PWBD + SC/ST: 15 years
Essential Qualification:
Only those Candidates who are possessing a University degree and who are non-recommended candidates of Civil Services Examination 2024 (CSE-2024) conducted by the Union Public Service Commission, as per list/ details available on UPSC Pratibha Setu Portal; are only eligible to apply for the above advertised posts.
Application Fee:
The category-wise application fee for various categories are as mentioned below.
Category
Fee
UR, OBC (NCL) & EWS
Rs 500/-
Women/SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/CSIR Dept. Candidates
Nil
Selection Process
Applications received in response to the advertisement shall be screened to shortlist the candidates to be called for Computer Proficiency Test (CPT) minimum in the ratio 1:5 (i.e. 5 times of total vacancies of ASO in each category, subject to minimum five), tentatively. The shortlisting will be made on the basis of total marks (i.e. Mains plus Personality Test) obtained by the candidate in UPSC’s CSE-2024 (as mentioned in their Mark Sheet). The shortlisted candidates will be required to appear in CPT. Qualifying in the CPT is mandatory for further consideration.
Final selection will be made on the basis of total marks (i.e. Mains plus Personality Test) obtained in the UPSC’s CSE-2024 subject to qualifying/securing minimum threshold marks in the Computer Proficiency Test (CPT), to be conducted by CSIR .
How to Apply for CSIR Recruitment ?
Interested and eligible candidates may apply online for these vacancy through online mode by visiting official Recruitment Portal. Candidates may follow below mentioned steps to apply for CSIR  Recruitment.
Scroll down, go to
Important Web-Links
section .
Click on the "
Online Application Form
" and a new webpage will be opened.
Fill your all
personal and educational details
and
upload
necessary documents.
Next,
pay the application fee
and
submit
the form.
At the end, take a
print
out of the application form .
Important Dates of CSIR ASO 2026
Starting date of online application submission: 23rd June 2026
Last date of online application submission: 13th July 2026

title: NEEPCO Recruitment 2026 – 38 Executive Posts, Online Apply
details:
Organization
North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited (NEEPCO)
Name of Post
Executive
No of Posts
38 posts
Qualification
Various
Age Limit
Various
(30 to 37 years)
Application Fee
Rs. 500/-
Start Date
23rd June 2026
Last Date
13th July 2026
NEEPCO Recruitment 2026
North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited (NEEPCO)
has released an employment notification for the recruitment of
38 Executive Posts
in
ERP, Corporate Communication, Civil, Security, Law, Safety, Finance, Medical and CSR, on Fixed Term Basis
.
Interested and eligible candidates may check this article for detailed official notification, educational qualification, age limit, salary details, and application procedure to be followed.
Last date submission of online application is
13th July 2026
.
NEEPCO Recruitment Details
1. Executive (ERP)
Post Code:
FTB/5/HR/49
No of posts:
2 posts (UR-2)
Age Limit:
37 years (as on 01-01-2026)
Educational Qualification:
Full-time B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc Engineering from a recognized university. Mandatory SAP certification in HCM module (SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HCM or SAP Success Factors Employee Central). Additional qualifications in HR/Personnel Management (MBA/PG Diploma) are advantageous.
Experience:
Minimum 7 years of post-qualification experience in SAP ERP HCM implementation, support, or rollout, covering PA, OM, TM, Payroll, and ESS/MSS.
Monthly Remuneration:
Rs. 1,66,000/- consolidated.
2. Executive (HR) (Corporate Communication)
Post Code:
FTB/5/HR/173
No of posts:
1 post (UR-1)
Age Limit:
37 years (as on 01-01-2026)
Educational Qualification:
Graduate with a 2-year full-time PG Degree or Diploma in Mass Communication / Journalism recognized by the Government of India.
Experience:
Minimum 7 years of experience in managing public relations/ corporate communication function, media planning, content creation, branding, and knowledge management systems, etc.
Monthly Remuneration:
Rs. 1,66,000/- consolidated.
3. Executive (Civil) - Grade 5
Post Code:
FTB/5/HR/12
No of posts:
3 posts (UR-3)
Age Limit:
37 years (as on 01-01-2026)
Educational Qualification:
Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or Institute.
Experience:
7 years of post-qualification experience in planning, survey & investigation, or civil construction works for Hydropower/PSP projects. Knowledge of CEA Guidelines for DPR preparation is mandatory along with SAP (S/4 HANA) proficiency, etc.
Monthly Remuneration:
Rs. 1,66,000/- consolidated.
4. Executive (Civil) - Grade 4
Post Code:
FTB/4/HR/13
No of posts:
3 posts (UR-2, OBC-NCL-1)
Age Limit:
34 years (as on 01-01-2026)
Educational Qualification:
Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or Institute.
Experience:
4 years of post-qualification experience in Hydropower/PSP projects, preferably in survey, investigation, and DPR preparation, etc. SAP (S/4 HANA) proficiency is required.
Monthly Remuneration:
Rs. 1,45,000/- consolidated.
5. Executive (Civil) - Grade 1
Post Code:
FTB/1/HR/21
No of posts:
3 posts (UR-1, SC-1, OBC-NCL-1)
Age Limit:
30 years (as on 01-01-2026)
Educational Qualification:
Full-time Bachelor's Degree or a 3-year Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or Institute.
Experience:
1 year of post-qualification experience for Degree holders, or 5 years for Diploma holders in Survey & Investigation works of hydropower/PSP projects. SAP (S/4 HANA) proficiency is mandatory.
Monthly Remuneration:
Rs. 71,000/- consolidated.
6. Executive (Security)
Post Code:
FTB/4/HR/291
No of posts:
4 posts (UR-2, SC-1, OBC-NCL-1)
Age Limit:
34 years (as on 01-01-2026)
Educational Qualification:
Graduate in any discipline recognized by the Government of India.
Experience:
Minimum 9 years of security system experience in the Armed Forces (Rank of Captain / Major / Lieutenant Colonel) or Central/State Police Organizations (Rank of DSP / SP or equivalent).
Monthly Remuneration:
Rs. 1,45,000/- consolidated.
